articles.title: Zac Gallen outduels Tarik Skubal, Diamondbacks sweep Tigers with a 1-0 victory
articles.original_title: Zac Gallen outduels Tarik Skubal, Diamondbacks sweep Tigers with a 1-0 victory
articles.summary: Zac Gallen outdueled two-time AL Cy Young winner Tarik Skubal, Corbin Carroll homered and the Arizona Diamondbacks beat the Detroit Tigers 1-0 on Wednesday to sweep the three-game series.  Carroll homered to left-center in the first to give the D-backs a 1-0 lead.  It was just the sixth homer the left-handed Skubal had ever allowed to a left-handed hitter.

articles.title: 2 months later, Pete Golding responds to Dabo Swinney's tampering rant
articles.original_title: 2 months later, Pete Golding responds to Dabo Swinney's tampering rant
articles.summary: Two months after Clemson's Dabo Swinney publicly accused Pete Golding of tampering in a 20-minute rant, the Ole Miss coach recounted the acquisition of linebacker Luke Ferrelli from his perspective.  Then, 20 days later, he transferred to Ole Miss.

articles.title: Marlins' Sandy Alcantara throws his 2nd career 'Maddux' and MLB's 1st complete game of the season
articles.original_title: Marlins' Sandy Alcantara throws his 2nd career 'Maddux' and MLB's 1st complete game of the season
articles.summary: Sandy Alcantara never stopped believing in himself.  Not when Tommy John surgery robbed him of the 2024 season.  Alcantara threw the first complete game of the MLB season in a 93-pitch shutout on Wednesday, leading the Miami Marlins to a 10-0 domination of the Chicago White Sox.

articles.title: Michigan State's Tom Izzo says he had serious talks last year about coaching NBA's Phoenix Suns
articles.original_title: Michigan State's Tom Izzo says he had serious talks last year about coaching NBA's Phoenix Suns
articles.summary: Michigan State's Tom Izzo said he considered coaching the Phoenix Suns after discussing the possibility last year with one of his former players, Mat Ishbia, who owns the NBA team.  “We talked seriously about it,” Izzo said Wednesday on “The Dan Patrick Show," during a virtual interview from his office on campus.  Izzo has turned down multiple opportunities to coach in the NBA, including with Cleveland and Atlanta.

articles.title: Masyn Winn's bloop single lifts Cardinals to 2-1 victory over slumping Mets in 11 innings
articles.original_title: Masyn Winn's bloop single lifts Cardinals to 2-1 victory over slumping Mets in 11 innings
articles.summary: Masyn Winn singled home the winning run with two outs in the 11th inning to give the St. Louis Cardinals a 2-1 victory over the slumping New York Mets on Wednesday.  Nolan Gorman hit a tying single in the sixth and reliever Gordon Graceffo (1-0) pitched out of a bases-loaded, one-out jam in the top of the 11th.  St. Louis (4-2) took two of three games from the Mets, who went 1 for 29 with runners in scoring position during the series, including 0 for 11 in the finale.

articles.summary: Michigan State basketball head coach Tom Izzo said he "talked seriously" with Suns majority owner Mat Ishbia about Phoenix's head coaching job last summer before the team ultimately hired Jordan Ott.

articles.title: Out like a lion: Luka ends March with 600 points
articles.original_title: Out like a lion: Luka ends March with 600 points
articles.summary: Luka Doncic had his third straight 40-point game, lifting his March scoring total to 600 points and adding to a strong month for the Lakers, who finished with a 15-2 record.

articles.summary: Former WNBA MVP and champions Candace Parker and Elena Delle Donne, along with former NBA star A'mare Stoudemire and current coach Doc Rivers will be inducted into the Basketball Hall of Fame Class of 2026.
